svg.title: RSO update storm 2026-04-17
svg.desc: Objects updated or newly introduced in the 2026-04-17 rolling archive, plotted by publication hour and NORAD catalog number.
svg.text: 2026-04-17 UTC publication window | sorted by CREATION_DATE hour and NORAD catalog number
27,415 updated objects + 14 new | 86,536 raw gp_history rows | archive 67,171 objects
Color = object type | Bright outlined marks = new to archive | Fine streaks = updated element sets | Dimmer marks often carry DECAY_DATE
